Welcome to My Blog

07.05.2024 · Georg Dües

Welcome to my blog.

Here I will publish short, practical articles on topics such as:

  • Linux and troubleshooting in day-to-day support
  • Knowledge transfer, training, and community work
  • Small automations that genuinely help teams

If you like, check back regularly. New posts will be added continuously.

"Be excellent to each other"
